scripts.build: esbuild assets/css/admin.css assets/css/product-notice.css assets/css/public-form.css --minify --outdir=assets/css --out-extension:.css=.min.css && esbuild assets/js/admin.js assets/js/checkout-consents.js assets/js/public-form.js --minify --outdir=assets/js --out-extension:.js=.min.js
scripts.watch: esbuild assets/css/admin.css assets/css/product-notice.css assets/css/public-form.css --minify --outdir=assets/css --out-extension:.css=.min.css --watch & esbuild assets/js/admin.js assets/js/checkout-consents.js assets/js/public-form.js --minify --outdir=assets/js --out-extension:.js=.min.js --watch
